---
title: "Georgiy Solomanchuk"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    #- icon: twitter
    #  text: twitter
    #  href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/georgiysolomanchuk
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/georgiy-solomanchuk
    #- icon: google
    #  text: Google Scholar
    #  href: https://scholar.google.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:georgiy_solomanchuk@brown.edu
---

I am a first-year Ph.D. student in Economics at Brown University.

My research interests lie in microeconomic theory : game theory, mechanism design, and behavioral economics.
